testcase.name: test_create_quarterly_recurrence
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_freq_carryover.py:39: in test_create_quarterly_recurrence assert r.status_code in (200, 201), r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","next_run"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"type":"expense","amount":50,"description":"TEST_QuartRec","start_date":"2026-07-14","frequency":"quarterly","account_id":"c9b5cdce-2ed9-44eb-9ee0-8b478244a010"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_semiannual_recurrence
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_freq_carryover.py:57: in test_create_semiannual_recurrence assert r.status_code in (200, 201), r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","next_run"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"type":"expense","amount":60,"description":"TEST_SemiRec","start_date":"2026-07-14","frequency":"semiannual","account_id":"c9b5cdce-2ed9-44eb-9ee0-8b478244a010"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
